workflows.label: Daily intel brief on the Bashi Channel
workflows.narrator: Build me a daily intel brief on the Bashi Channel, INDOPACOM AOR.

tasks.label: Analyze 4 ISR photos of Bashi Channel surface contacts
tasks.input_summary: 4 EO/IR frames, 1920x1080, captured by RQ-21A Blackjack on 2026-04-26 0312Z

tasks.label: Categorize 200 ASAM (Anti-Shipping Activity Messages) events
tasks.input_summary: 200 short maritime threat messages from NGA ASAM feed; classify by hostile/criminal/nav-hazard

tasks.label: Synthesize 50K-token corpus of PACOM open-source reporting
tasks.input_summary: 50,000 tokens of CSIS, USNI, Janes, and NGA OSINT excerpts from past 30 days

tasks.label: Fire 3 tools to validate facts (AIS lookup, NGA gazetteer, weather)
tasks.input_summary: Three tool calls with structured args: ais.lookup(mmsi), nga.gazetteer(name), wx.tropical(lat,lon)

tasks.label: Write final SIPR-style INTSUM in Marine voice
tasks.input_summary: Compose 800-word INTSUM: BLUF, situation, threats, recommended ISR/MISO actions, BDA

workflows.label: Stand-up HA/DR cell for typhoon-corridor response
workflows.narrator: Spin up an HA/DR plan for an inbound super typhoon.

tasks.label: Analyze pre-landfall satellite imagery of impacted islands
tasks.input_summary: 6 SkySat 1m EO frames over Luzon and Babuyan

tasks.label: RAG over FEMA disaster declarations + USAID OFDA reports
tasks.input_summary: Retrieve 40 chunks from prior typhoon-response playbooks

tasks.label: Tag 500 social-media posts by triage urgency
tasks.input_summary: 500 short Filipino-language posts; classify SAR-urgent / shelter / medical / non-urgent

tasks.label: Plan 72-hour distribution of palletized water + MREs
tasks.input_summary: Multi-step agent: pull stock levels, route via airfields, dispatch CH-53K sorties

tasks.label: Draft commander's intent paragraph + execution checklist
tasks.input_summary: 800 words, FRAGORD-flavored

workflows.label: Class IX parts-demand forecast for forward-deployed MAGTF
workflows.narrator: Forecast 30-day Class IX demand and stage forward.

tasks.label: Pull line-item NSNs from 18 PDFs of GCSS-MC reports
tasks.input_summary: 18 PDFs, average 14 pages, mix of OCR'd scans

tasks.label: Project 30-day demand per NSN with seasonality adjust
tasks.input_summary: Time-series math over 12 months of consumption history

tasks.label: Call DLA stock + lift availability + COSIS shelf-life APIs
tasks.input_summary: 3 sequential tool calls + 1 conditional follow-up

tasks.label: CUI-tag the consolidated forecast for SIPR upload
tasks.input_summary: Tag 80 forecast lines with CUI marking + DODI 5200.48 banner

tasks.label: Logistics commander's executive summary
tasks.input_summary: 600 words, table + BLUF

workflows.label: MEU port-call force-protection assessment (Subic)
workflows.narrator: Build a port-call FP assessment in 10 minutes.

tasks.label: Read 8 commercial overhead frames of the harbor + approaches
tasks.input_summary: 8 PlanetScope 3m frames, 2026-04-25

tasks.label: Translate 60 Filipino + Mandarin local-news snippets
tasks.input_summary: 60 snippets, 80-200 words each

tasks.label: Triage 300 known-vehicle and PoL signatures from FP feed
tasks.input_summary: 300 short event records

tasks.label: Recommend pier assignment + rover patrol pattern
tasks.input_summary: Multi-step plan with constraints

tasks.label: FP officer's executive brief
tasks.input_summary: 700 words SIPR-style
